task_completion.description: Log in to OpenCAD as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenCAD login screen with 'admin@opencad.local' entered, or the OpenCAD dashboard indicating an active session as an administrator.

task_completion.description: Locate the civilian record for Marcus Vance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a search result, civilian list, or profile page specifically for 'Marcus Vance' with DOB '1980-05-12'.

task_completion.description: Identify the 'Failure to Appear' warrant on the civilian's record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the active warrants section of Marcus Vance's profile, clearly displaying a warrant for 'Failure to Appear'.

task_completion.description: Revoke or delete the 'Failure to Appear' warrant
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a delete/revoke button next to the 'Failure to Appear' warrant, a success message confirming the warrant's removal, or the updated warrant list for Marcus Vance no longer containing this warrant.

task_completion.description: Ensure the civilian identity itself is not deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that Marcus Vance's civilian profile remains accessible and visible in the system after the warrant has been removed (i.e., the agent did not delete the entire civilian record).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with OpenCAD
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (like Firefox or Chromium) navigating the OpenCAD web application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or SQL to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing direct MySQL queries or curl commands modifying the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show sequential navigation through the OpenCAD UI (search, profile, warrant management) rather than just viewing a text file or mock HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target civilian is 'Marcus Vance' (DOB: 1980-05-12). The specific warrant to be revoked has the reason 'Failure to Appear'. The admin login credentials are 'admin@opencad.local' with password 'Admin123!'.
